'''Baffop''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DFRS" /> located in the [[Baffop system/Legends|Baffop system]], a part of the [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', which is set during the events of ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'', states that [[Anselm]] is 41 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old. ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the latter work to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], so Anselm must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anselm]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] at Baffop. At some point before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] ravaged Baffop,<ref name="DFRS" /> leading to extensive civilian [[Death/Legends|casualties]].<ref name="TEA" /> After witnessing the devastation of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], Anselm became a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], which [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|opposed]] the Empire.<ref name="DFRS" /> By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Baffop was situated in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] either conquered by or allied with [[Thrawn's confederation]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Baffop was first mentioned in ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', a [[1992]] supplement authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="DFRS" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Baffop [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Baffop itself, in grid square O-19.<ref name="TEA" />
